mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM register r WHERE (r.visit_state = 1 AND r.check_in_time IS NOT NULL) OR r.visit_state = 2
AND (r.case_number ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.real_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN visit_state = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "totalVisited", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN visit_state IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "totalWaiting" FROM register

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", readme AS "readme", present AS "present", present_treat AS "presentTreat", history AS "history", allergy AS "allergy", physique AS "physique", proposal AS "proposal", careful AS "careful", diagnosis AS "diagnosis", cure AS "cure" FROM medical_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId}

SELECT d.id AS "id", d.disease_code AS "diseaseCode", d.disease_name AS "diseaseName", d.diseaseicd AS "diseaseIcd", d.disease_category AS "diseaseCategory" FROM medical_record_disease mrd INNER JOIN disease d ON d.id = mrd.disease_id WHERE mrd.medical_record_id = #{medicalRecordId} ORDER BY d.disease_name
mapper.update: UPDATE medical_record SET readme = #{readme}, present = #{present}, present_treat = #{presentTreat}, history = #{history}, allergy = #{allergy}, physique = #{physique}, proposal = #{proposal} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_record_disease (medical_record_id, disease_id) VALUES (#{medicalRecordId}, #{diseaseId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO check_request (register_id, medical_technology_id, check_info, check_position, check_remark) VALUES (#{registerId}, #{medicalTechnologyId}, #{checkInfo}, #{checkPosition}, #{checkRemark})

INSERT INTO inspection_request (register_id, medical_technology_id, inspection_info, inspection_position, inspection_remark) VALUES (#{registerId}, #{medicalTechnologyId}, #{inspectionInfo}, #{inspectionPosition}, #{inspectionRemark})

INSERT INTO disposal_request (register_id, medical_technology_id, disposal_info, disposal_position, disposal_remark) VALUES (#{registerId}, #{medicalTechnologyId}, #{disposalInfo}, #{disposalPosition}, #{disposalRemark})
mapper.select: SELECT cr.id AS "id", mt.tech_name AS "techName", cr.check_position AS "checkPosition", cr.check_result AS "checkResult", cr.check_state AS "checkState", cr.check_time AS "checkTime", cr.check_remark AS "checkRemark", a.risk_level AS "riskLevel", a.analysis_report AS "analysisReport", a.abnormal_indicators AS "abnormalIndicators", a.correlation_analysis AS "correlationAnalysis" FROM check_request cr INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = cr.medical_technology_id LEFT JOIN ai_exam_analysis a ON a.check_request_id = cr.id WHERE cr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY cr.creation_time DESC, cr.id DESC

SELECT ir.id AS "id", mt.tech_name AS "techName", ir.inspection_position AS "inspectionPosition", ir.inspection_result AS "inspectionResult", ir.inspection_state AS "inspectionState", ir.inspection_time AS "inspectionTime", ir.inspection_remark AS "inspectionRemark", a.risk_level AS "riskLevel", a.analysis_report AS "analysisReport", a.abnormal_indicators AS "abnormalIndicators", a.correlation_analysis AS "correlationAnalysis" FROM inspection_request ir INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = ir.medical_technology_id LEFT JOIN ai_exam_analysis a ON a.inspection_request_id = ir.id WHERE ir.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY ir.creation_time DESC, ir.id DESC

SELECT id AS "id", disease_code AS "diseaseCode", disease_name AS "diseaseName", diseaseicd AS "diseaseIcd", disease_category AS "diseaseCategory" FROM disease
disease_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR disease_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR diseaseicd ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY disease_name LIMIT 50

SELECT id AS "id", drug_code AS "drugCode", drug_name AS "drugName", drug_format AS "drugFormat", drug_unit AS "drugUnit", manufacturer AS "manufacturer", drug_dosage AS "drugDosage", drug_type AS "drugType", drug_price AS "drugPrice", mnemonic_code AS "mnemonicCode" FROM drug_info
drug_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR drug_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mnemonic_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY drug_name LIMIT 50

SELECT id AS "id", drug_code AS "drugCode", drug_name AS "drugName", drug_format AS "drugFormat", drug_unit AS "drugUnit", manufacturer AS "manufacturer", drug_dosage AS "drugDosage", drug_type AS "drugType", drug_price AS "drugPrice", mnemonic_code AS "mnemonicCode", creation_date AS "creationDate" FROM drug_info WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prescription (register_id, drug_id, drug_usage, drug_number) VALUES (#{registerId}, #{drugId}, #{drugUsage}, #{drugNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS "id", p.register_id AS "registerId", p.drug_id AS "drugId", d.drug_name AS "drugName", d.drug_format AS "drugFormat", d.drug_unit AS "drugUnit", d.drug_price AS "drugPrice", p.drug_usage AS "drugUsage", p.drug_number AS "drugNumber", p.drug_state AS "drugState", p.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM prescription p INNER JOIN drug_info d ON d.id = p.drug_id WHERE p.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY p.creation_time DESC, p.id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM prescription WHERE id = #{id} AND drug_state = '未发'
mapper.select: SELECT id AS "id", tech_id AS "techId", tech_name AS "techName", suggest_type AS "suggestType", suggest_reason AS "suggestReason", priority AS "priority", is_adopted AS "isAdopted" FROM ai_exam_suggestion WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY priority ASC, id DESC

SELECT id AS "id", disease_id AS "diseaseId", disease_name AS "diseaseName", recommend_icd AS "recommendIcd", probability AS "probability", risk_level AS "riskLevel", treatment_direction AS "treatmentDirection", diagnosis_basis AS "diagnosisBasis", is_adopted AS "isAdopted", sort_order AS "sortOrder" FROM ai_diagnosis_suggestion WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, probability DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT id AS "reviewId", review_result AS "reviewResult", drug_conflict AS "drugConflict", allergy_risk AS "allergyRisk", duplicate_drug AS "duplicateDrug", dosage_check AS "dosageCheck", risk_score AS "riskScore", risk_details AS "riskDetails", doctor_action AS "doctorAction", review_time AS "reviewTime" FROM ai_prescription_review WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY review_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
